violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 1-door low boy and the prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2026
The floor tile in the back kitchen area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The floor throughout the basement area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. On the prep unit, gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2023

The tile floor in the back area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. After speaking with manager a service order is in place to fix floor. Floor is scheduled to be fixed in January. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2024
The floor in the basement has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2023
